info.name: FaceAuth API
info.description: Postman Collection for testing the CPU-only Face Authentication System

request.description: Checks if the FaceAuth application is running and the models are successfully loaded.

formdata.description: Unique identifier for the user (e.g. Employee ID or username)
1 to 4 face images for enrollment. Select file type and upload images.

request.description: Enrolls a new user in the database. Processes the face images, extracts embeddings, validates quality, and stores the face features.

formdata.description: The face image to be recognized/matched.

request.description: Takes an input face image, detects the face, extracts the embedding, matches it against all registered users' embeddings in the database using Cosine Similarity, and returns the match result.
